sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82165" key="perissa/delfos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περισσάδελφος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n82165.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having an extraordinary number of brothers</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:18:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18.33</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
